title: thelypteris molliuscula
intro: Thelypteris molliuscula, also known as the Fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris molliuscula include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
